statement: In every magma, Equation 2380 (`x = (y * (z * (x * w))) * u`) implies Equation 4422 (`x * (x * y) = (z * y) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0823
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op x w))) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op x y)) = (op (op z y) w)
